msg_summary: Bank of India Q4 Business Update: Global Business up 14.53% YoY
IndiGo February market share at 63.1% vs 63.6% in January
CASA ratio at 49.8% as of March 31, 2026
Retail loan book grows to ~₹1,19,550 crores, up 26% Y-O-Y
Bank of India global business up 14.5% yoy to ₹16.98 lakh cr
Indian Bank total business up 13.1% to ₹14.98 lakh cr
L&T Finance retail loan book grows to ~₹1,19,550 crores, up 26% y-o-y
Indian railways approves rs 398.36 crores optical fibre cable backbone project
Airlines are now cancelling flights as jet fuel shortages spread globally
